channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Scores: Week 9 of the high school football season in Bakersfield, Kern County
item.description: BAKERSFIELD, Calif. (KGET) -- We are nearing that championship season. This week is the time to determine which teams are the real deal. Several teams made their cases Friday night. Below are the scores from this week's games: Thursday, Oct.
item.dc:creator: Jose Franco, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Belichick's North Carolina tenure hit by heartbreaking loss to Cal after late fumble
item.description: Bill Belichick's tenure at North Carolina has been challenging, with the team still seeking its first victory against a power opponent.
item.dc:creator: Josh Dubow, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Shohei Ohtani hits 3 homers and strikes out 10 in Dodgers' clinching 5-1 NLCS win over Brewers
item.description: Shohei Ohtani has propelled the Los Angeles Dodgers back to the World Series with a two-way performance for the ages.
item.dc:creator: Greg Beacham, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Mariners a win from first World Series, beat Blue Jays behind Suárez's grand slam for 3-2 ALCS lead
item.description: SEATTLE (AP) — As Eugenio Suárez crossed home plate, he formed a heart with his hands as he has countless times. Suárez suddenly stopped, pointed toward his wife in the stands behind home plate and took a second to embrace the moment.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DESTIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Alex Ovechkin's first goal of the season brings him within 2 of the 900 mark for his career
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Alex Ovechkin's mini-drought is over. The countdown to another milestone can begin again. Ovechkin scored his first goal of the season Friday night, moving to within two of 900 for his career and helping the Washington Capitals to a 5-1 victory over the Minnesota Wild.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Joel Embiid returns to action for 76ers in preseason finale, first game in nearly 8 months
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Joel Embiid started for the Philadelphia 76ers in their preseason finale on Friday night, his first game action in nearly eight months. And he flirted with a triple-double.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bill Belichick, Jordon Hudson's hot mic moment leaked amid UNC's drama-filled season
item.description: Leaked footage shows North Carolina coach Bill Belichick and his girlfriend, Jordon Hudson, criticizing a graphics team during the filming of his TV show last year.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ohtani puts on 2-way Sho for the ages with 3 homers and 10 Ks to lead Dodgers back to World Series
item.description: Shohei Ohtani hit three home runs and pitched shutout ball into the seventh inning for the Los Angeles Dodgers, putting on a spectacular two-way show in Game 4 of the National League Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: Greg Beacham, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Rashee Rice to play first game for Chiefs in more than a year after suspension
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Rashee Rice knows almost to the day how long it's been since he played in a game for the Kansas City Chiefs. Two more days until he does it again.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Column: The Bears only need to find one more offensive lineman
item.description: The Chicago Bears' offensive line has shown significant growth, but right guard Jonah Jackson has struggled to hold up in pass protection and run blocking, needing to improve in order for the team to avoid a letdown.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Mikel Arteta and Sean McVay's bromance blooms as Premier League and NFL collide in London
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta and Los Angeles Rams coach Sean McVay can take their bromance to new levels this weekend. Their teams — both owned by Stan Kroenke — are playing in the same city.
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: FIFA announces over 1 million tickets sold for 2026 World Cup in North America
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — More than 1 million tickets have already been sold for next year's World Cup, FIFA said Thursday in its first update on numbers since the official start of sales began earlier this month. The highest demand, as would be expected, were from buyers in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lia Thomas speaks for first time since UPenn agreed to Trump admin resolution to protect women's sports
item.description: Transgender swimmer Lia Thomas spoke publicly for the first time since the University of Pennsylvania stripped her records in compliance with the Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Indiana extends Curt Cignetti on massive 8-year deal as Penn State loses out on coaching target
item.description: Indiana University secured head coach Curt Cignetti with a massive contract extension worth $11.6 million per season through 2033 after his program turnaround success.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: PHOTOS: Angel Reese becomes first pro athlete to walk in Victoria's Secret Fashion Show
item.description: Angel Reese took her game from the court to the catwalk and made history along the way. The Chicago Sky forward became the first professional athlete to walk in the Victoria’s Secret Fashion Show on Wednesday, joining the brand’s high-profile “Wings Reveal” lineup in New York.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN LANDRUM Jr., Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Burakovsky scores as Chicago beats the Utah Mammoth 3-1 for Blashill's first win with the Blackhawks
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Andre Burakovsky snapped a third-period tie, and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the Utah Mammoth 3-1 on Monday night for coach Jeff Blashill’s first win with his new team. Chicago dropped its first three games despite being tied at 2 after the second period in each contest.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Inside Michael Andretti's home listed for nearly $12 million
item.description: FISHERS, Ind. — The home of former Andretti Global owner and race car driver Michael Andretti is for sale. The 21,000-square-foot estate is situated on a 5.23-acre parcel of land that is located along the shores of Geist Reservoir in Fishers.
item.dc:creator: Austin Hanson, NewsNation

item.title: Mike Shildt retires as San Diego Padres manager
item.description: Mike Shildt informed the Padres organization Saturday that he is retiring as the club's manager, citing mental and physical toll, after leading San Diego to two consecutive 90-win seasons and playoff appearances.
item.dc:creator: Sharisse Cohee, Fox 5

item.title: BYU improves to 6-0 with double overtime win at Arizona
item.description: TUCSON, Ariz. (ABC4 Sports) - BYU came from ten points down in the fourth quarter to remain unbeaten on the year with a thrilling 33-27 win at Arizona Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
